hook.headline: If she doesn’t reply to THIS I’m retiring.

reply.text: Wild question how much trouble usually starts when you dress like this

messages.text: not happening
that handbag looks like it steals boyfriends on weekends
and?
in that bathroom it definitely holds alibis too
bathroom this cute comes with legal representation
attorney present like "she was just washing her hands"
exactly, i scrub sins not evidence babes
say less, its me
you are confident, not convincing
id fail the appeal, accept my fate proudly
bold when you havent met my cross examination
first question would fold me i fear
first question is why you watching my purse so hard 👀
cause it screams run while you still can
you say that while still standing here though
i dont chase, i attract
i have questions
you already know why
ok fine, don't waste it
